## Summary
I've successfully renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` in the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view/operation.py`:
### Changes Made:
1. **Line 116**: `ctx.plan_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch()` → `ctx.pr_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch()` 2. **Line 142**: `ctx.plan_backend.get_all_metadata_fields()` → `ctx.pr_backend.get_all_metadata_fields()`
